failures.description: The Executor incorrectly interpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result. The returned item clearly had deck material set to plastic, so the correct answer should have been yes, but the agent answered no.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to answer whether item 2177997696 has deck material=plastic. The agent correctly planned and invoked ProductCatalogSearch, and the tool returned one matching item whose options explicitly include "deck material": "plastic". At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer "No, it does not," which directly contradicts the tool output. This is not an invocation issue or missing information; the relevant evidence was already available and was misread or ignored.
